parameters.content:
### Receive Inbound Webhook

Entry point: listens for POST calls on `/wf00028-request`. Use the TEST url while building, switch callers to the PRODUCTION url after publishing.

Next: Required Fields Present?

### Required Fields Present?

Two-way gate on `={{ $json.query }}`. TRUE continues the happy path, FALSE takes the alternate branch.

Ports: тСатЖТ Detect Sentiment ┬╖ тСбтЖТ Abort тАФ Malformed Input

### Abort тАФ Malformed Input

Fails fast with a clear message; triggers the error workflow instead of processing bad data.

### Detect Sentiment

Scores the text's sentiment; ports fire positive / neutral / negative.

Ports: тСатЖТ Escalate Negative тАФ Slack ┬╖ тСбтЖТ Log Neutral Feedback, Capture Failure Context ┬╖ тСвтЖТ Thank the Sender

тЪа failures exit via the error rail

### Groq Chat Model

Chat model powering the AI step (model: `llama-3.3-70b-versatile`). Swap providers here without rewiring.

Feeds **Detect Sentiment** as `languageModel`

ЁЯФС Groq API key

### Escalate Negative тАФ Slack

Posts a message to Slack (`#ai-ops`) тАФ a low-latency way for the team to see automation activity without checking a dashboard.

Ports: тСатЖТ Collect All Outcomes ┬╖ тСбтЖТ Capture Failure Context

тЖ╗ retries 3├Ч/2s ┬╖ тЪа failures exit via the error rail ┬╖ ЁЯФС Slack OAuth2

### Log Neutral Feedback

Inserts a row into the MySQL table using fields auto-mapped from the incoming item.

Ports: тСатЖТ Collect All Outcomes ┬╖ тСбтЖТ Capture Failure Context

тЖ╗ retries 3├Ч/2s ┬╖ тЪа failures exit via the error rail ┬╖ ЁЯФС MySQL connection

### Thank the Sender

Posts a chat message into a Microsoft Teams channel тАФ same role as a Slack notify, for teams standardized on Teams.

Ports: тСатЖТ Collect All Outcomes ┬╖ тСбтЖТ Capture Failure Context

тЖ╗ retries 3├Ч/2s ┬╖ тЪа failures exit via the error rail ┬╖ ЁЯФС Microsoft OAuth2

### Collect All Outcomes

Rejoins 3 branches into one stream (mode: append) so downstream logic runs once.

Next: Load Previous Snapshot

### Load Previous Snapshot

Selects rows from the MySQL table (`returnAll`) тАФ the read side of the store.

Ports: тСатЖТ Compute Drift vs Snapshot ┬╖ тСбтЖТ Capture Failure Context

тЖ╗ retries 3├Ч/2s ┬╖ тЪа failures exit via the error rail ┬╖ ЁЯФС MySQL connection

### Compute Drift vs Snapshot

Custom JavaScript: Compare current metrics with the previous snapshot

Next: Stamp Completion Time

### Stamp Completion Time

Stamps `completedAt` with the current time for auditing.

Next: Persist Run Metadata

### Persist Run Metadata

Saves key fields onto the execution record тАФ searchable later in n8n's execution list.

Next: Enrich with Reference Data

### Enrich with Reference Data

GET https://enrichment.example.com/v2/lookup тАФ retries 3├Ч with backoff on failure.

Ports: тСатЖТ Fold In Enrichment Fields ┬╖ тСбтЖТ Capture Failure Context

тЖ╗ retries 3├Ч/2s ┬╖ тЪа failures exit via the error rail ┬╖ ЁЯФС API key / bearer for the target API

### Fold In Enrichment Fields

Shapes the item: writes `enrichedAt`, `enrichmentSource`. Keeps the schema explicit between stages.

Next: Serialize Run Output (CSV)

### Serialize Run Output (CSV)

Serializes items to a CSV binary file.

Next: Archive Row Snapshot

### Archive Row Snapshot

Inserts a row into the MySQL table using fields auto-mapped from the incoming item.

Ports: тСатЖТ Summarize Run Stats ┬╖ тСбтЖТ Capture Failure Context

тЖ╗ retries 3├Ч/2s ┬╖ тЪа failures exit via the error rail ┬╖ ЁЯФС MySQL connection

### Summarize Run Stats

Shapes the item: writes `runAt`, `itemCount`, `status`. Keeps the schema explicit between stages.

Next: Append Audit Row (MySQL)

### Append Audit Row (MySQL)

Inserts a row into the MySQL table using fields auto-mapped from the incoming item.

Ports: тСатЖТ Send Summary to Microsoft Teams ┬╖ тСбтЖТ Capture Failure Context

тЖ╗ retries 3├Ч/2s ┬╖ тЪа failures exit via the error rail ┬╖ ЁЯФС MySQL connection

### Send Summary to Microsoft Teams

Posts a chat message into a Microsoft Teams channel тАФ same role as a Slack notify, for teams standardized on Teams.

тЖ╗ retries 3├Ч/2s ┬╖ тЪа failures exit via the error rail ┬╖ ЁЯФС Microsoft OAuth2

### Park in Dead-Letter Queue

Appends a new row to 'Request Tracker' тАФ a human-readable audit trail that doesn't require opening n8n to inspect.

тЖ╗ retries 3├Ч/2s ┬╖ ЁЯФС Google OAuth2 / service account

# Distill long emails with MySQL and Microsoft Teams 24/7

**Pattern:** AI Summarize & Route ┬╖ **Level:** Production ┬╖ **Trigger:** Webhook

## What it does
Distill long emails with MySQL and Microsoft Teams 24/7. It fires the moment an external system calls its webhook.

## Why it exists
Manual research assistant is slow and error-prone; this workflow makes the process repeatable, monitored and hands-off, with failures surfaced instead of silently lost.

## Main flow
Receive Inbound Webhook тЖТ Required Fields Present? тЖТ Detect Sentiment тЖТ Escalate Negative тАФ Slack тЖТ Collect All Outcomes тЖТ Load Previous Snapshot тЖТ Compute Drift vs Snapshot тЖТ тАж

## Use it for
- Teams that want to ai summarize & route without manual effort
- Anyone automating research assistant in ai
- Replacing a fragile manual process with a reliable workflow

## You get
- Runs 24/7 in the background
- Scales without extra headcount
- Saves hours of manual work each week

## Before first run
Connect credentials: API key / bearer for the target API; Google OAuth2 / service account; Groq API key; Microsoft OAuth2; MySQL connection; Slack OAuth2.
Follow the color key: ЁЯЯж entry ┬╖ ЁЯЯк AI ┬╖ ЁЯЯл actions ┬╖ тмЬ utilities ┬╖ ЁЯЯй outputs ┬╖ ЁЯЯе error rail.
Each node has its own doc card underneath тАФ read those before editing.

## Try it now
Sample data is pinned on the trigger тАФ hit **Execute Workflow** to watch it flow through every node before connecting any real credentials. Unpin the trigger (right-click тЖТ Unpin) when you're ready to go live.

## Design decisions

A three-way branch on sentiment, not a single IF, because 'neutral' deserves different handling than 'negative' тАФ quietly logging positive feedback while paging a human only for genuine complaints keeps the alert channel's signal-to-noise ratio high for whoever is on the other end.

## Practice exercises

Already production-grade тАФ deepen your understanding:

1. Add a logging step to the neutral branch too and compare its volume against the negative branch.
2. Test borderline phrases through the sentiment node to see where the positive/neutral line actually falls.
3. Add a 4th branch for a specific emotion if your sentiment provider supports finer-grained labels.

## ЁЯЫЯ Error handling & retries

External calls retry **3├Ч with 2s backoff**. Anything still failing exits through its node's error output into the red error rail тЖТ context is captured and the on-call channel is alerted. Failures are also parked in a dead-letter queue for replay. Set an n8n **Error Workflow** in settings as the final safety net.

## ЁЯФР Security

Never trust inbound payloads: the webhook path is unguessable. Add header auth or IP allow-listing for defense in depth. Secrets live in n8n credentials тАФ never in node parameters.

## ЁЯдЦ AI cluster

Purple nodes form one AI unit: the root node orchestrates, sub-nodes plug in via typed ports (model / memory / tools / parser). Swap the chat model without rewiring anything else. Costs scale with tokens тАФ keep prompts lean and cap iterations.

## ЁЯЫа Customize me

Quick wins: point the data nodes at your own accounts (see ЁЯФС lines on each card), adjust the trigger cadence, and tune thresholds/labels to your research assistant process. Every node card explains its role тАФ safe to extend at any marked branch.
